prophecies.q: 释迦牟尼佛预言正法、像法、末法三期
prophecies.a: 如来灭后，正法住世五百年，像法住世一千年，末法住世一万年。末法之后，佛法灭尽，众生无复善根。
prophecies.q_en: Shakyamuni Buddha prophesied the three periods of Dharma
prophecies.a_en: After the Tathagata's passing, the True Dharma shall endure for five hundred years, the Semblance Dharma for one thousand years, and the Decline of Dharma for ten thousand years. After the Decline, the Buddhist teachings shall vanish entirely, and beings shall have no wholesome roots remaining.

prophecies.q: 末法时代众生道德败坏
prophecies.a: 末法之时，众生寿命转短，福德浅薄。人心不古，父不慈、子不孝、臣不忠。贪嗔痴炽盛，杀盗淫妄无所不为。国土饥馑，疾疫流行，刀兵不断。
prophecies.q_en: Moral collapse of beings in the age of Dharma decline
prophecies.a_en: In the age of Dharma decline, the lifespan of beings shall shorten and their merit shall be meager. Human hearts shall lose their ancient virtue — fathers shall be unkind, children unfilial, ministers disloyal. Greed, hatred, and delusion shall burn fiercely; killing, stealing, sexual misconduct, and lying shall be rampant. Lands shall suffer famine, epidemics shall spread, and wars shall never cease.

prophecies.q: 末法时代佛法将如何衰灭
prophecies.a: 末法之际，《首楞严经》《般舟三昧经》先灭，十二部经随之消亡。唯余《无量寿经》最后住世百年，度尽有缘。此经灭后，唯余「南无阿弥陀佛」六字留世，复百年后六字亦灭，佛法于世间彻底消失。
prophecies.q_en: How the Dharma will decline and vanish
prophecies.a_en: In the final age, the Shurangama Sutra and the Pratyutpanna Samadhi Sutra shall vanish first, followed by the twelve divisions of the canon. Only the Sutra of Infinite Life shall remain for a final hundred years, saving those with karmic connection. After this sutra vanishes, only the six characters 'Namo Amitabha Buddha' shall linger in the world; after another hundred years, even these six characters shall disappear, and the Dharma shall be utterly gone from the world.

prophecies.q: 弥勒菩萨现居兜率天宫内院
prophecies.a: 弥勒菩萨于兜率陀天内院，为诸天众说法。兜率天宫庄严殊胜，宝树成行，天乐自鸣。弥勒于彼天中，以本愿力，教化天众，等待因缘成熟，当来下生人间。
prophecies.q_en: Maitreya Bodhisattva currently resides in Tushita Heaven
prophecies.a_en: Maitreya Bodhisattva dwells in the inner court of Tushita Heaven, teaching the Dharma to the celestial assembly. Tushita Heaven is magnificent and sublime, with rows of jeweled trees and heavenly music playing spontaneously. There, through the power of his original vows, Maitreya teaches the heavenly beings, awaiting the ripening of conditions for his future descent to the human world.

prophecies.q: 弥勒降世时人间的理想条件
prophecies.a: 弥勒下生之时，阎浮提地平如掌，纵广正等。土地丰沃，自然生衣食。人寿八万四千岁，身长十六丈。无有疾病，无有灾厄。人民和善，无相争斗。
prophecies.q_en: Ideal conditions in the human world when Maitreya descends
prophecies.a_en: When Maitreya descends to be born, the continent of Jambudvipa shall be flat as a palm, even and level. The land shall be rich and fertile, producing clothing and food naturally. Human lifespan shall be eighty-four thousand years, and people shall stand sixteen zhang tall. There shall be no disease, no calamity. People shall be kind and gentle, with no conflict or strife.

prophecies.q: 转轮圣王儴佉将治理天下
prophecies.a: 尔时有转轮圣王名曰儴佉，以正法治化四天下。七宝具足，有金轮宝、白象宝、绀马宝、神珠宝、玉女宝、居士宝、主兵宝。王有千子，勇猛端正。四海之内，不用兵杖，自然归服。
prophecies.q_en: The Cakravartin King Shankha shall rule the world
prophecies.a_en: At that time there shall be a wheel-turning monarch named Shankha, who shall govern the four continents with righteous law. He shall possess the seven treasures: the golden wheel, the white elephant, the blue horse, the divine pearl, the queen, the householder minister, and the general. The king shall have a thousand brave and handsome sons. The four seas shall submit without the use of arms, through natural allegiance.

prophecies.q: 弥勒降世时的翅头末城
prophecies.a: 弥勒降生之国，有大城名翅头末城（又名鸡头城），纵广十二由旬。城中街巷整齐，宫殿楼阁庄严。金银琉璃为饰，处处悬挂宝铃。城中人民富乐安稳，犹如天宫。
prophecies.q_en: The city of Ketumatī when Maitreya descends
prophecies.a_en: The land where Maitreya shall be born will have a great city called Ketumatī (also known as 'Chicken Head City'), twelve yojanas in length and breadth. Its streets and alleys shall be orderly, its palaces and pavilions magnificent. It shall be adorned with gold, silver, and lapis lazuli, with jeweled bells hanging everywhere. The people in the city shall live in prosperity and peace, as if dwelling in a heavenly palace.

prophecies.a: 弥勒生于婆罗门家，姓慈氏。见世间老病死苦，遂出家修道。于华林园中龙华树下，结跏趺坐，即于是夜成最正觉。龙华树高四十里，枝叶覆荫广三十里。
prophecies.a_en: Maitreya shall be born into a Brahmin family, with the surname Maitreya ('Benevolent'). Seeing the suffering of old age, sickness, and death in the world, he shall renounce worldly life to cultivate the Way. Beneath the Dragon Flower Tree in the Garden of Flowers, he shall sit cross-legged and on that very night attain supreme perfect enlightenment. The Dragon Flower Tree shall stand forty li high, its branches and leaves casting shade for thirty li.

prophecies.a: 弥勒成佛后，于龙华树下三转法轮。初会说法，度九十六亿人得阿罗汉果。二会说法，度九十四亿人。三会说法，度九十二亿人。三会度尽一切有缘众生。
prophecies.q_en: The three Dragon Flower Assemblies to liberate all beings
prophecies.a_en: After attaining Buddhahood, Maitreya shall turn the Wheel of Dharma three times beneath the Dragon Flower Tree. At the first assembly, he shall liberate nine billion six hundred million beings who shall attain Arhatship. At the second assembly, nine billion four hundred million. At the third assembly, nine billion two hundred million. Through these three assemblies, all beings with karmic connection shall be liberated.

prophecies.q: 弥勒佛将接续释迦牟尼佛的度化事业
prophecies.a: 释迦牟尼佛告诸弟子：我灭度后，未得度者，皆当付嘱弥勒。弥勒当来下生，为汝等说法。汝等若持戒修善，当于弥勒佛前得度脱。释迦遗教弟子，悉为弥勒弟子。
prophecies.q_en: Maitreya shall continue Shakyamuni's mission of liberation
prophecies.a_en: Shakyamuni Buddha told his disciples: After my Parinirvana, all those not yet liberated shall be entrusted to Maitreya. When Maitreya comes to be born in the future, he shall teach the Dharma for you. If you uphold the precepts and cultivate virtue, you shall attain liberation in the presence of Maitreya Buddha. All disciples of Shakyamuni's legacy teachings shall become disciples of Maitreya.

prophecies.q: 弥勒佛将开启释迦牟尼佛的遗骨舍利塔
prophecies.a: 弥勒成佛后，将开启释迦牟尼佛之舍利塔。取出舍利，供养礼拜。令诸众生见释迦遗骨，生恭敬心，发菩提心。以此因缘，度无量众生。
prophecies.q_en: Maitreya shall open Shakyamuni's reliquary stupa
prophecies.a_en: After attaining Buddhahood, Maitreya shall open the reliquary stupa of Shakyamuni Buddha. He shall retrieve the relics and make offerings of veneration. He shall cause all beings who see Shakyamuni's remains to give rise to reverence and generate the aspiration for enlightenment. Through this karmic connection, countless beings shall be liberated.

prophecies.a: 弥勒佛说法以慈心为本。不以苦行摄众，而以安乐法门度脱群迷。弥勒佛世，众生根利福厚，闻法即悟，不假多劫修行。一生补处，即得不退转。
prophecies.q_en: The characteristics of Maitreya Buddha's teachings
prophecies.a_en: Maitreya Buddha shall teach with loving-kindness as the foundation. He shall not guide beings through ascetic practices, but shall liberate the deluded through the gate of ease and joy. In Maitreya's age, beings shall have sharp faculties and abundant merit; upon hearing the Dharma they shall awaken immediately, without need for eons of practice. In one lifetime they shall reach the stage of non-retrogression.

prophecies.q: 弥勒佛世的人间净土景象
prophecies.a: 弥勒佛世，大地平正，无有山陵沟壑。气候调和，雨泽以时。谷物丰登，一种七获。树木花果四季常荣。人民无有贫富之差，不相盗窃。夜不闭户，路不拾遗。
prophecies.q_en: The Pure Land on earth during Maitreya's age
prophecies.a_en: In the age of Maitreya Buddha, the great earth shall be level and smooth, without mountains, ridges, or ravines. The climate shall be harmonious, with rain falling in due season. Crops shall be abundant, yielding seven harvests from one sowing. Trees, flowers, and fruits shall flourish through all four seasons. Among the people there shall be no distinction of rich and poor, no theft. Doors need not be locked at night, and lost goods on the road shall go untouched.

prophecies.q: 弥勒佛涅槃后正法住世之预言
prophecies.a: 弥勒佛住世六万年，说法度生。涅槃之后，正法住世亦六万年。较释迦佛正法住世五百年，弥勒正法住世远为久长。此后复入末法，更待未来诸佛出世。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy of the True Dharma's duration after Maitreya's Parinirvana
prophecies.a_en: Maitreya Buddha shall dwell in the world for sixty thousand years, teaching the Dharma and liberating beings. After his Parinirvana, the True Dharma shall endure for another sixty thousand years. Compared to Shakyamuni Buddha's True Dharma lasting five hundred years, Maitreya's True Dharma shall last far longer. Thereafter, the world shall again enter the age of decline, awaiting the appearance of future Buddhas.
